title: Sample manuscript fragment

Intro paragraph before any heading.

## Opening — market dawn

Fog on the canal. A bell rings once.

## Scene — the exchange

Two figures trade a sealed letter. Neither speaks the city tongue.

## Notes for the editor

This block is a normal H2 but does not match scene-like heuristics.

## Chapter four — the sealed road

The road turned inland; the trees closed overhead.
